name: FlyQuest
narrativeHook: The team nobody picked to win is now the team nobody wants to play. Believe the hype.

unsungHero.reason: Busio's vision control is the silent engine behind FlyQuest's dominant early games — rarely highlighted, always essential.

name: Cloud9
narrativeHook: The perennial contenders finding their rhythm again — dangerous when underestimated.

unsungHero.reason: Fudge absorbs pressure in the top lane so the rest of Cloud9 can play free — an unselfish carry in disguise.

name: Team Liquid
narrativeHook: Built to win on paper, still searching for the fire that turns rosters into champions.

unsungHero.reason: CoreJJ doesn't win games — he stops them from being lost. His positioning is a masterclass the broadcast rarely stops to explain.

name: 100 Thieves
narrativeHook: A mid-season reinvention that nobody saw coming — now playing their best League of the year.

unsungHero.reason: Closer's pathing has been quietly suffocating opponents — he doesn't show up in the highlight reel but he's why 100T's lanes are winning.

name: NRG
narrativeHook: Talented individually, still searching for the cohesion that turns potential into results.

unsungHero.reason: Ignar is the only reason NRG's bot lane has looked playable — his roaming is the one consistent bright spot on a frustrating team.

name: Evil Geniuses
narrativeHook: Inconsistency is their only constant — brilliant one week, puzzling the next.

unsungHero.reason: Vulcan is making losing look closer than it is — his engage timing is the one thing keeping EG in games they probably shouldn't be in.

name: Dignitas
narrativeHook: Playing with nothing to lose — and that might be exactly what makes them dangerous.

unsungHero.reason: Canna is winning lane in games where nothing else is going right — the lone highlight on a team rebuilding its identity.

name: Immortals
narrativeHook: A young roster absorbing hard lessons — the foundation for something better is here.

unsungHero.reason: Kenvi is competing every game despite the scoreboard — his effort in a rebuilding year is the only reason to watch Immortals with optimism.
